meta-descriptions.home: Luxury bakery storefront for small-batch cookies, ice cream, and coffee with membership and order-first calls to action.
meta-descriptions.products: Explore Rodeo 893 cookies, ice cream, and signature coffee in a curated product gallery.
meta-descriptions.productsCookies: See all Rodeo 893 cookies and browse the available flavors.
meta-descriptions.productsIceCream: See all Rodeo 893 ice cream offerings and browse the available flavors.
meta-descriptions.productsCoffee: See Rodeo 893 coffee and its signature pour.
meta-descriptions.membership: Join the Rodeo 893 membership for priority drops, early ordering, and premium bakery perks.
meta-descriptions.account: View profile, saved addresses, and membership status in your Rodeo 893 account.
meta-descriptions.orders: Review your order flow, recent orders, and delivery guidance at Rodeo 893.
meta-descriptions.about: Read the story behind Rodeo 893 and its small-batch bakery philosophy.
meta-descriptions.contact: Get in touch with Rodeo 893 for pre-orders, events, and collection details.
meta-descriptions.productVanilla: A quiet, buttery vanilla cookie with a refined finish.
meta-descriptions.productMocha: A roasted mocha cookie balancing cocoa depth and coffee perfume.
meta-descriptions.productChocoChip: A rich choco chip cookie with dark chocolate and a soft center.
meta-descriptions.productPeanutButter: A dense peanut butter cookie with a polished savory edge.
meta-descriptions.productAlmondCrescent: A delicate almond crescent with a ceremonial finish.
meta-descriptions.productIceCreamChoco: Dark choco ice cream with a silkier, grown-up profile.
meta-descriptions.productIceCreamCoffee: Coffee ice cream with a roasted, elegant backbone.
meta-descriptions.productBlueCheeseCoffee: Signature blue cheese coffee for guests who want something daring and memorable.

brand.name: Rodeo 893
brand.subtitle: Bakery
brand.eyebrow: Pre-order only · Small batch · Made to order

hero.eyebrow: Pre-order only · Small batch · Made to order
hero.description: Luxury, pared down. Cookies, ice cream, and coffee made in limited runs with patient ingredients and a deliberate finish.
hero.membershipNote: Members get first access to drops and preferred collection windows.

featured.title: A short menu, treated with care.
featured.description: The catalog stays compact so every batch can feel considered. Start with the classics, then move into the more unusual pours and fillings.

membership.title: For regulars who want the first word.
membership.description: Membership is the primary conversion surface. It should feel premium, useful, and calm: early release notices, priority ordering windows, and a cleaner repeat-order rhythm.

process.title: A quieter, more intentional order flow.
steps: Choose from the current menu and featured drops.
Select membership if you want priority access and easier repeats.
Place a pre-order request and wait for confirmation details.

story.title: Small batch without the rustic costume.
story.description: The visual direction should feel elegant rather than cute: warm parchment, dark espresso, sharp typography, and enough restraint that every product card feels intentional.

finalCta.title: Join first, or order directly.
finalCta.description: Every major surface should lead guests toward membership or an order-oriented action without shouting for attention.

productsPage.title: Cookies, ice cream, and one signature coffee.
productsPage.description: The listing stays generic and structured, while each product still has its own content file for later expansion and localized storytelling.

hero.title: A collection that feels more like a product launch than a catalog.
hero.description: Start with the overview, then move into category pages for flavors and detail pages for each signature item.

membershipPage.title: Premium access for returning guests.
membershipPage.description: This page exists to convert. It should explain why membership matters, what priority access means, and how it simplifies repeat orders.
membershipPage.reassurance: Built for customers who order frequently and prefer a quieter, faster checkout rhythm.
steps: Activate membership once from your account.
Receive early menu windows and limited-drop notifications.
Use your saved profile and addresses for faster repeat ordering.
membershipPage.conciergeText: For recurring orders, events, and gifting, membership keeps communication tighter and scheduling smoother.
benefits: Priority access to drops and limited batches
Cleaner repeat-order flow through your account
A premium feeling without a noisy loyalty gimmick

accountPage.title: Profile, addresses, and membership state.
accountPage.description: The account surface should mirror the backend model: profile details, membership status, stored addresses, and space for future credit balance and order actions.

ordersPage.title: Order flow, references, and future tracking.
ordersPage.description: Phase one stops short of live checkout, but the information architecture already matches the backend: order references, delivery info, notes, and tracking-ready detail.

aboutPage.title: A bakery language built on restraint.
aboutPage.description: Rodeo 893 should feel luxurious because it is specific, not because it is loud. The pages should stay sparse, warm, and exact.

contactPage.title: Orders, events, and collection details.
contactPage.description: Use this page for inquiries, wholesale conversations, and collection guidance, while keeping the primary actions focused on membership and products.
channels: Instagram for menu drops and quick updates
Email for event and partnership inquiries
Direct order guidance for pickup or delivery coordination

productVanilla.name: Vanilla
productVanilla.description: A restrained vanilla cookie built around butter, soft edges, and a clean finish.

productMocha.name: Mocha
productMocha.description: Mocha with a roasted perfume and a darker cocoa backbone.

productChocoChip.name: Choco chip
productChocoChip.description: A dark chocolate cookie with a soft center and a polished finish.

productPeanutButter.name: Peanut butter
productPeanutButter.description: Peanut butter made dense, savory, and a little more refined than expected.

productAlmondCrescent.name: Almond crescent
productAlmondCrescent.description: A delicate almond crescent designed for a quieter, ceremonial sort of indulgence.

productIceCreamChoco.name: Choco
productIceCreamChoco.description: Dark choco ice cream with a richer profile and a clean melt.

productIceCreamCoffee.name: Coffee
productIceCreamCoffee.description: Coffee ice cream with roasted depth and an elegant bitterness.

productBlueCheeseCoffee.name: Blue cheese coffee
productBlueCheeseCoffee.description: The signature pour: unexpected, aromatic, and designed to be remembered.
